title: Eval harness: memory-grounded+cited vs. blank-slate (accuracy/groundedness/fit) -- full version of eval-029
context: The full eval harness is the definitive proof of the grounded-vs-blank-slate thesis. It runs all core faculties (Duties & Roles, Ethics & Compliance, Briefings) in both grounded+cited mode and blank-slate mode on a comprehensive fixture set; an LLM judge scores accuracy, groundedness/citation, and fit. The headline metric is the delta: grounded+cited must clearly beat blank-slate or the thesis is flagged failing. This is an expansion of the minimal kill-gate from eval-029.
objective: Build the full eval harness running core faculties grounded+cited vs. blank-slate on a comprehensive fixture set, with LLM-judge scoring of accuracy, groundedness/citation, and fit -- reporting the delta as the project's thesis proof.
acceptanceCriteria: Runs Duties & Roles, Ethics & Compliance, and Meeting/Vote Briefing faculties in grounded+cited and blank-slate modes on a comprehensive fixture set (minimum 20 fixture scenarios)
LLM judge scores each pair on accuracy, groundedness/citation, and fit
Reports the delta: grounded+cited must clearly beat blank-slate on all three dimensions or the output flags the thesis as failing
If grounded+cited does not clearly beat blank-slate, the eval output blocks M5 and requires review
Expert (ethics/legal) reviews the accuracy dimension of the eval results on legal/duty content
output: A merged PR with the full grounded-vs-blank-slate eval harness, LLM-judge scoring, delta report, and thesis-failing flag logic, establishing the definitive evidence for the project's core claim.
